name: F1 Predictions
summary: Calibrated race-outcome forecasts for every Formula 1 Grand Prix.
description: The MotorsportVerse flagship. A three-pathway prediction engine — qualifying-pace regression, Plackett-Luce probability calibration, and a per-lap Monte Carlo race simulator — with continuous-learning infrastructure (model registry, drift detection, A/B promotion) and a live static-export dashboard. Reference implementation for all other projects.
